title: 10 Manifestation Journal Prompts for Goal Setting & Alignment
intro: Manifestation is a practical tool for keeping the mind focused on a specific vision. These 10 prompts are designed to bridge the gap between daily actions and long-term goals, helping to identify limiting beliefs and align every step with a clear future path.
items: If you had no fear of failure, what is the first big goal you would pursue today?
Describe your perfect day three years from now in vivid, sensory detail.
What are three limiting beliefs you are ready to release right now?
How would your 'highest self' handle the biggest challenge you are currently facing?
What does abundance look like to you beyond just financial wealth?
List five things you can do this week that align with your long-term vision.
Who is someone that inspires you, and what qualities do they have that you want to cultivate?
Write a thank-you note to the Universe for a goal you haven't achieved yet, as if it has already happened.
What is one small step you can take today that your future self will thank you for?
What environment or setting makes you feel most empowered and capable of achieving your goals?
